name: Library of Integrated Network-Based Cellular Signatures
description: LINCS is an NIH Common Fund program that generates and catalogs perturbation-induced changes in gene expression and other cellular processes, aiming to create a comprehensive network-based understanding of how cells respond to various perturbations including drugs, genetic modifications, and environmental factors.
citation: Keenan AB, et al. The Library of Integrated Network-Based Cellular Signatures NIH Program: System-Level Cataloging of Human Cells Response to Perturbations. Cell Syst. 2018 Jan 24;6(1):13-24. doi: 10.1016/j.cels.2017.11.001. Epub 2017 Nov 29. PMID: 29199020; PMCID: PMC5799026.
